section.heading: Reporting payments made to witnesses before Committee on Standards of Official Conduct

content.p: Notwithstanding any other provision of law or any other rule or regulation, any information on payments made by the Committee on Standards of Official Conduct of the House of Representatives to an individual for attendance as a witness before the Committee in executive session during a Congress shall be reported not later than the second semiannual report filed under section 5535 of this title in the following Congress.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified as a note under section 104b of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.

note.heading: Change of Name
note.p: Committee on Standards of Official Conduct of House of Representatives changed to Committee on Ethics of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Twelfth Congress, Jan. 5, 2011.
